name: Sorcerous Origin
description: Choose a Sorcerous Origin, which grants additional features as you gain Sorcerer levels.

name: Font of Magic
description: You gain sorcery points that fuel your magical abilities and can be converted into spell slots or used by other Sorcerer features.

name: Metamagic
description: You gain the ability to alter your spells by applying Metamagic options using your sorcery points.

name: Magical Guidance
description: When you fail an ability check, you can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll the d20, using the new result.

name: Sorcerous Restoration
description: You regain a number of expended sorcery points whenever you finish a short rest.
